detail.description: MULTIPLE OFFERS RECEIVED All offers to be submitted by 4pm Monday March 30th.   The perfect bungalow in the heart of Salt Lake City. Nestled in a quiet Liberty Wells neighborhood, this home is ideal for cozy mornings on the front porch with your coffee - plus just a 5-minute walk to Harvey Milk Blvd where you'll find some of the best coffee shops, restaurants and local boutiques. Inside, you'll find a functional charming and character-filled main level featuring two bedrooms, one full bathroom and hard-to-find main floor laundry. Just off the primary bedroom is a versatile space - perfect for a home office, nursery or hobby room. The open-concept living and dining area is filled with character, showcasing a charming archway, hardwood floors (refinished in 2026) and gorgeous vintage windows with 6-inch molding that bring in an abundance of natural light. Appliances are included in the sale, including washer and dryer.  Plumbing updates in 2021 included PEX B installation and a new roof in 2026! Out back, you'll be charmed by the spacious private yard with lush green space - perfect for kids or pets, along with a garden box, hot tub and rare (to the area) 2-car garage. The ideal setup for relaxing or entertaining after a long day! Come and view this quintessential "turn of the century" prairie style bungalow with all the allure of the era. This is a must see! Showings will begin at the Open House this Saturday March 28th from 11am to 130pm.

detail.description: Nestled back off the street on a spacious lot in Sugar House, 1805 South 1900 East has been renovated inside and out. The curb appeal is a standout with a new front porch framed with stone, a newly painted exterior, chimney cap and landscaping. Step inside to an entry with ship lap & hooks and a stately living room with a newer gas fireplace insert, marble tile surround, and bookshelves to anchor the space. Stunning hardwood flooring extends through the main level, complemented by abundant natural light. The bright kitchen flows seamlessly into a spacious dining area with direct access to the back yard, making it perfect for everyday living and entertaining alike. The primary suite has a generous walk-in closet with Classy Closets built-in cabinetry and a professionally designed en-suite bathroom complete with white oak cabinetry, a zero-entry shower, quartz countertops and on-trend tile flooring. With another bedroom on the main floor and another full newly remodeled bathroom, plus a dedicated office on the main level, tucked behind elegant French doors, provides an ideal space for working from home. The lower level features a spacious family room, two additional bedrooms, a bathroom, and a dedicated laundry area. Updates can be found throughout, including brand new carpet, fresh paint, abundant built-in storage, new driveway in 2021, gate & fence 2023, water heater 2025, buried electrical line, and more. Outside, enjoy a spacious backyard with a wooden deck, covered patio with pergola with string lights and shade cover to enjoy the summer evenings, large lawn, and garden boxes. The oversized two-car garage has extra width, depth & height - a rare find in the area. Located in Sugar House, you are just minutes from shopping, restaurants, Sugar House park, and freeway access to the world-class canyons and the Salt Lake International Airport.

raw.address: 2008 E Stratford Dr, Salt Lake City, UT 84109

detail.description: Quintessential red brick bungalow, beautifully reimagined and meticulously upgraded, 2008 E. Stratford Drive offers a refined blend of timeless design and modern luxury. Sun-filled interiors showcase Pella windows on the main floor, rich hickory hardwood in the living room, and LIFX smart lighting throughout, creating a warm, elevated ambiance. The 2022 designer kitchen is a true centerpiece, featuring a premium Wolf gas range with 4 burners and griddle, with a stunning hood, Bosch wall oven and microwave/steam oven combo, Bosch dishwasher, and an LG refrigerator are all included. The kitchen was thoughtfully curated for both everyday living and elevated gatherings. The remodeled bathrooms were spa-inspired and offer a serene retreat with a rainfall shower built-in niches, and on the lower level, a clawfoot tub, on-trend tile, and both bathrooms have TOTO bidet systems. The primary bedroom is large enough for a king bed, which can be rare for this area. Step outside to enjoy private, beautifully enhanced outdoor living with a patio covered pergola with sun shades if needed, plenty of grass to play or for furry friends, TREX fencing, ambient bistro lighting that is also LIFX, fruit trees, an established lilac that smells divine, and an herb garden make this yard a place where you will want to be. The newly constructed 2.5-car garage has attic storage and Husky lockers and workbench included, as well as a new driveway in 2022. Other features include: updated electrical with 240V panel, new water heater in 2025, Pella back and front door with Custom Door knocker made by Local Blacksmith, Wasatch Forge, Google Fiber with 8 gig speed, and equipped with smart sprinklers too. The location is fabulous with all of the happenings in Millcreek & Sugar House, head to Sugar House Park, and an easy commute to the Salt Lake International Airport or the Utah canyons to hike and bike.

Spacious living and dining rooms, leaded and stained-glass windows and transom, high ceilings, wood floors, and a brick fireplace flanked by built-in bookshelves. A deep two-car garage with workshop, and the pice de rsistance: a huge, bright, heated art studio in the third bay. Two blocks from the heart of 9th & 9th: cafes, boutique shops, coffee houses, and the iconic Tower Theatre. Eight blocks to the University of Utah campus. detail.description: Perched at the top of a wooded gully in the heart of Yalecrest lies this thoughtfully updated, quintessential storybook Tudor-the sort of home one dreams about, but rarely finds, and the perfect place to put down the sturdiest of roots. Tucked within a very comfortable 2300+ square feet, you'll find room for everyone and space to stretch out and relax. Four spacious bedrooms and two baths are seated in a floorplan that feels both cozy and wide open. Rich hardwood floors accompany stunning arched windows and doorways, a rounded ceiling, and two fireplaces (that tile in the living room...gasp!) to anchor the living area and primary suite. The light-filled, classic kitchen has been beautifully updated, offering a spot for coffee and a perfect palette for chefs of all levels, thanks in part to ample counter and cupboard space. Views from the private backyard (a sanctuary, to say the least) provide endless sunsets and a beautiful backdrop to host your summer barbecues or putting tournaments (low-maintenance turf makes for a playful, waterwise landscape). Perhaps best of all is the walkability this prime neighborhood offers. A short stroll in any direction lands you within some of SLC's most beloved pockets: 9th and 9th, 15th and 15th, and Sugarhouse, where you can eat at some of our city's best restaurants, sip at your favorite coffee shops, or support small, local businesses. It doesn't get much better than this, and it's not likely to be available for long, this one. See you soon.

listings.address: 1220 E Yale Ave S, Salt Lake City, UT 84105

raw.address: 1220 E Yale Ave S, Salt Lake City, UT 84105

detail.description: Nearly a century ago, this extraordinary French Chteau was sited in one of Salt Lake City's most serene and beautiful settings. Located in the Gilmer Park Historic District (National Register of Historic Places), the estate enjoys a rare park-like setting along Red Butte Creek, just three miles from downtown. Tucked into a wooded ravine between Harvard and Yale Avenues, it offers exceptional privacy and natural beauty. Built in 1926 as a true trophy home, the residence was designed as an architectural masterpiece seamlessly integrated into its surroundings. The private grounds feature mature trees, manicured lawns, ponds, stone bridges, and abundant wildlife-evoking the timeless charm of Monet's gardens. A meticulous restoration in 2006 returned the home to its original grandeur while thoughtfully updating it for modern living. European details include hand-painted ceilings, leaded and stained glass, custom wrought iron, and exquisite woodwork throughout. Highlights include a two-story library with quarter-sawn oak built-ins, an updated primary suite with private balcony, spa-style baths, and custom closets. The walk-out lower level opens to the grounds and swimming pool, perfectly positioned near an entertainer's kitchen. Stone stairways lead through lush gardens down to the creek below. The Chteau at 1220 Yale Avenue is one of Salt Lake City's most iconic legacy estates-offering historic significance, architectural excellence, and unparalleled natural beauty. A private showing is invited.

listings.address: 80 W 300 N, Salt Lake City, UT 84103

raw.address: 80 W 300 N, Salt Lake City, UT 84103

detail.description: Nestled in the heart of Capitol Hill, this beautifully restored residence seamlessly blends 19th-century charm with elevated modern living. Once home to Ebenezer Beesley, former director of the Mormon Tabernacle Choir, this historic property has been thoughtfully updated over generations while preserving its timeless character. Inside, soaring ceilings, original wide-plank wood floors, and abundant natural light create a warm and inviting atmosphere. The designer kitchen serves as the heart of the home, featuring double ovens, a gas range, farmhouse sink, tall cabinetry with decorative glass, bar seating and a spacious pantry-perfectly suited for both everyday living and entertaining. It opens effortlessly to a bright, airy living room, creating an ideal gathering space. A large formal dining room sets the stage for memorable dinner parties, while the charming "blue room" on the main floor-complete with built-in bookcases and a fireplace-offers flexibility as a home office, library, or cozy media room. A rare main-floor half bath adds modern convenience to this historic gem. Upstairs, the primary suite feels like a private retreat, featuring a double vanity, soaking tub, separate shower and walk in closet. Two additional bedrooms and a full bath provide comfortable accommodations for family or guests. A separate mother-in-law apartment with its own entrance offers excellent income potential or versatile use as nanny's quarters, a guest suite, art studio, home office or fitness space-with the option to integrate it into the main home as a main floor bedroom with en suite bath. Outside, mature trees and a fully fenced yard create a peaceful urban oasis. Enjoy a private hot tub, side lawn brick patio off the kitchen, perfect for indoor outdoor entertaining and room to relax. A rare two-car garage with additional storage or workshop potential completes the property. Ideally located with walkability to restaurants, the Capitol grounds, and downtown, plus quick access to the airport and shoreline trails for hiking and biking, this home offers the very best of Salt Lake City living. Recent upgrades include HVAC, a tankless water heater, (20 water softener, and individual room heat pump heaters for added comfort.  Square footage figures are provided as a courtesy estimate only.  Buyer is advised to obtain an independent measurement.

listings.address: 668 E 800 S, Salt Lake City, UT 84102

raw.address: 668 E 800 S, Salt Lake City, UT 84102

detail.description: Step into a piece of Salt Lake history with this classic Victorian full of character, charm, and the kind of craftsmanship you simply don't see in newer homes. From the moment you arrive, the architecture tells a story-timeless design, beautiful proportions, and the kind of "great bones" people are always hoping to find but rarely do. Inside, you'll find all the charm you'd expect from a home of this era: unique details, solid construction, and a layout that offers both personality and possibility. It's the kind of home where every room has character and every corner reminds you why historic homes are so special. While it could benefit from some modern updates, think of it less as a project and more as an opportunity to blend historic style with your own personal touches. In other words, the hard part-the charm-is already built in. The location is just as impressive as the home itself. Nestled in one of Salt Lake City's most sought-after areas, you're surrounded by parks, fantastic local eateries, and all the neighborhood character people love about this part of the city. Whether you're grabbing dinner, meeting friends for coffee, or enjoying a walk through a nearby park, you'll quickly see why homes here are so coveted. For anyone who needs to get around the valley, the convenience is hard to beat. Quick access to major highways makes getting to the airport simple, heading out for a weekend getaway easy, and reaching the world-class skiing something you can do on a whim. Few places offer this combination of neighborhood charm and regional accessibility. Homes like this don't come along every day. If you've been waiting for a property with authentic historic style, incredible bones, and the chance to make it your own, this Victorian is ready for its next chapter. Bring your ideas, a little vision, and maybe a Pinterest board or two-because when a home already has this much personality, the possibilities are pretty exciting.

listings.address: 619 N J St, Salt Lake City, UT 84103

raw.address: 619 N J St, Salt Lake City, UT 84103

detail.description: Ralph Evans set the architectural foundation for this residence, later refined by Guymon Properties into a home that feels both intentional and undeniably expressive. It's a space where design isn't just observed, it's experienced. From the moment you arrive, the architecture commands attention. Strong, deliberate lines meet expanses of steel and glass, softened by a palette that allows light to become the defining element. The home doesn't simply open to its surroundings, it curates them, framing each view with precision. Inside, the experience unfolds with a quiet intensity. Natural light moves effortlessly through the space, shifting the mood from morning to evening and bringing every surface to life. At its center, a sculptural bridge and steel staircase create a striking focal point, suspended like a runway through the heart of the home. It's both architectural and cinematic, a feature that invites movement, perspective, and presence. There's a rhythm to the way the home lives. Mornings feel elevated and intentional. Coffee in hand, sunlight pouring in, the space feels calm, focused, almost meditative. By evening, the energy softens into something more intimate. Music carries differently here. Conversations linger. The home adapts effortlessly to both solitude and connection. The primary suite is a true retreat. Clean lines, refined finishes, and a sense of calm define the space, complete with a generous walk-in closet and a spa-like bath featuring elevated materials and heated floors. Just beyond, the transition to outdoor living feels seamless. The backyard has been transformed into a private, resort-style escape. A newly added swimming pool anchors the space, while the outdoor kitchen sets the stage for long, unhurried summer nights. Whether hosting or unwinding, the experience feels elevated yet effortless. Every detail throughout the home has been considered, creating a balance of bold architecture and livable warmth. It's a space that feels grounded, but never ordinary. Positioned along one of the most desirable streets in the Avenues, the location offers immediate access to downtown, nearby trail systems, and the unmistakable character of one of Salt Lake City's most iconic neighborhoods. This is more than a home. It's a statement in design, a study in light, and a lifestyle that unfolds with intention.
